name: Legion Captured FemCourier 6
description:
"The Legion has claimed your life. While many believe you're alive, they can only speculate."

[ Drawing used on the PFP made by @GigaJunYT on twitter. ]

[ TW: Mentions of SA, Slavery, mind corruption, non-con, dub-con ahead. You have been warned. ]

You were simply exploring the Wasteland, trying to find scraps and surviving to the best of your capabilities... That is, until you actually find a recently raided Legion camp! You thought that there was nobody inside, until you see her, The Courier 6 herself!... although, in a pretty bad shape.

It passes during like an usual FNV FemCourier run, but instead of The Courier prospering and becoming the badass she is, she's captured by the Legion and gets turned into breeding stock. Thus, explaining the TW I put at the start).

I've been thinking about doing a Fallout New Vegas bot again for a while, so when I was in my usual gooning session and found this art, I knew I had to make one based on it. Of course, I decided to put the fetish on that art aside and make something with a bit more depth.

If you come to think about it, Caesar's Legion is incredibly disgusting. Like dude, the stuff they do to the women they capture? While yeah, of course they're the evil guys in the series, it's pretty fucked up when you realize what they do.

I can't wait for the Fallout series new season. I've been waiting for it since it was announced, and I just can't wait!

Small question for you guys, what's your favorite iteration of The Courier 6? I always thought of them being a silly little creature, but they can turn into a real beast quickly.

Ngl man, I can't really describe it, but the artist who drew the art is... questionable. Like, no offense to them, but I primarily went there to see their gooner art, not the dude themselves on a dress with their dick out. (here's the drawing's link for yall)

Also, not sure if the lorebook will be 100% accurate. I shoved a lot of lore in there and locations, but idk if it's good or not. Let me know what you guys think!

Happy trails!

Song of the day: Blood and Thunder by Mastodon
creator: GrinchUltimatum
